div1.entryFree: Dulcet, sweet to the ear: such d. and harmonious breath, Mids. II, 1, 151. d. sounds in break of day, Merch. III, 2, 51. according to the fool's bolt, and such d. diseases, As V, 4, 68. a d. and a heavenly sound, Shr. Ind. I, 51. discord d. All's I, 1, 186. to hear by the nose, it is d. in contagion, Tw. II, 3, 58.
